channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Inside Small UK Operations Room Handling Persian Gulf Ship Emergencies

media:content.media:description: The UKMTO team also contacts the shipping company that owns the vessel.

item.description: Whenever commercial vessels come under attack or face security threats in the region, captains often contact the UKMTO first for guidance and emergency coordination.
item.content:encoded: Whenever commercial vessels come under attack or face security threats in the region, captains often contact the UKMTO first for guidance and emergency coordination.

item.title: New York Woman Gives Birth In Court During Hearing On Drug Charges
item.description: The NYPD said Randazzo was wearing loose clothing at the time of her arrest and did not initially tell officers she was pregnant.
item.content:encoded: The NYPD said Randazzo was wearing loose clothing at the time of her arrest and did not initially tell officers she was pregnant.

item.title: Tanzania Intensifies Ebola Preparedness As DRC Outbreak Raises Regional Concern

media:content.media:description: Surveillance and health screening of travellers have been strengthened at border points

item.description: Tanzania has conducted a rapid assessment of proximity and interaction with outbreak areas in Congo and Uganda to identify regions at highest risk and take appropriate measures.
item.content:encoded: Tanzania has conducted a rapid assessment of proximity and interaction with outbreak areas in Congo and Uganda to identify regions at highest risk and take appropriate measures.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Hormuz And The Case For Shared Responsibility
item.description: The legal tools for sharing Hormuz's burden already exist. What's missing is the political will.
item.content:encoded: The legal tools for sharing Hormuz's burden already exist. What's missing is the political will.

item.title: Congolese Report Constant Burials As Deaths In New Ebola Outbreak Reach 87
item.description: At least 87 deaths have been reported in Congo's new Ebola disease outbreak in eastern Ituri province, the Africa CDC has said.
item.content:encoded: At least 87 deaths have been reported in Congo's new Ebola disease outbreak in eastern Ituri province, the Africa CDC has said.

item.title: Former Google CEO Gets Booed For Talking About AI At Graduation Ceremony

media:content.media:description: Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt was repeatedly booed while speaking about AI during a graduation speech

item.description: Eric Schmidt's commencement speech revealed a growing unease among young people entering an AI-driven job market
item.content:encoded: Eric Schmidt's commencement speech revealed a growing unease among young people entering an AI-driven job market

item.title: 2 Dead, 13 Buildings Collapsed After 5.2-Magnitude Earthquake Hits China

media:content.media:description: Rescue workers walk past a damaged building following an earthquake in China

item.description: There were two confirmed deaths with one still missing, and four people were sent to the hospital
item.content:encoded: There were two confirmed deaths with one still missing, and four people were sent to the hospital

item.title: US Iran War News Highlights: Trump's "Clock Ticking" Threat To Iran, Tehran Readies Hormuz Traffic "Mechanism"
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: Trump Posts Gulf Map With US Flag, Explosion Pics Amid War Escalation Threats

media:content.media:description: One image showed a map of Iran with an American flag overlaid on it

item.description: The latest online blitz came after Trump issued a fresh warning to Iran, saying it had to move quickly towards a peace deal or "there won't be anything left of them."
item.content:encoded: The latest online blitz came after Trump issued a fresh warning to Iran, saying it had to move quickly towards a peace deal or "there won't be anything left of them."

item.title: Hantavirus Alert: 9 UK Contacts Under Monitoring, Says Health Agency
item.description: Nine people were due to fly into Britain Sunday from UK overseas territories after coming into contact with a person with hantavirus...
item.content:encoded: Nine people were due to fly into Britain Sunday from UK overseas territories after coming into contact with a person with hantavirus...

item.title: 'Limited Patience': Iran Warns UAE Against 'Entangling In Israel's Schemes'

media:content.media:description: The UAE was the first Gulf country, alongside Bahrain, to recognise Israel in 2020

item.description: Tehran's threat came after a drone strike sparked a fire on the edge of the UAE's sole nuclear power plant on Sunday in what authorities called an "unprovoked terrorist attack".
item.content:encoded: Tehran's threat came after a drone strike sparked a fire on the edge of the UAE's sole nuclear power plant on Sunday in what authorities called an "unprovoked terrorist attack".

item.title: "Dangerous Escalation": India Condemns Attack On UAE Nuclear Plant

media:content.media:description: It's the first time the four-reactor Barakah plant has been targeted in the war.

item.description: The UAE said three drones entered from the western border - one struck the inner perimeter of the nuclear facility, while two others were intercepted.
item.content:encoded: The UAE said three drones entered from the western border - one struck the inner perimeter of the nuclear facility, while two others were intercepted.

item.title: Indian Student, 25, Dies In Road Accident In US

media:content.media:description: The student's death was caused by blunt force traumatic injuries sustained in the accident

item.description: Indian student Navya Gadusu dies in road accident near Chicago, six others injured.
item.content:encoded: Indian student Navya Gadusu dies in road accident near Chicago, six others injured.

item.title: 'Lack Of Knowledge': India Rejects Dutch PM's Remarks On Press Freedom, Minority Rights

media:content.media:description: The exchange took place when a Dutch journalist questioned the absence of a joint press interaction

item.description: The diplomat, citing the recently held assembly elections in several regions in the country, said India is a "vibrant democracy" where "peaceful transition of power" is a key feature.
item.content:encoded: The diplomat, citing the recently held assembly elections in several regions in the country, said India is a "vibrant democracy" where "peaceful transition of power" is a key feature.

item.title: Video: Moment 2 Jets Collided Mid-Air At US Air Show

media:content.media:description: The aircraft were performing an aerial demonstration when the collision occurred

item.description: Two US Navy EA18-G Growlers Collide During Air Show In Idaho
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1100627/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Two US Navy EA18-G Growlers Collide During Air Show In Idaho

item.title: 6 Of A Family Among 10 Shot Dead In Mexico, Domestic Dispute Suspected

media:content.media:description: Authorities did not say whether there were any suspects in killings (Representational)

item.description: Six men, three women and a minor died in a shooting inside a home in the municipality of Tehuitzingo, located approximately 200 kilometers south of Mexico City
item.content:encoded: Six men, three women and a minor died in a shooting inside a home in the municipality of Tehuitzingo, located approximately 200 kilometers south of Mexico City

item.title: 4 Key Takeaways From Elon Musk's Lawsuit Against OpenAI Co-Founders

media:content.media:description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman (File)

item.description: At the opening of the trial on April 28, Musk portrayed himself as a selfless benefactor and Good Samaritan concerned with protecting humanity from an AI that, if left in the wrong hands, could "kill us all."
item.content:encoded: At the opening of the trial on April 28, Musk portrayed himself as a selfless benefactor and Good Samaritan concerned with protecting humanity from an AI that, if left in the wrong hands, could "kill us all."

item.title: Qantas Flight To Texas Diverted After Passenger Allegedly 'Bites' Crew Member Mid-Air

media:content.media:description: The video does not show the alleged biting.

item.description: He became even more aggressive when the staff told him that they might restrain him. Several passengers also got up to help the crew control him.
item.content:encoded: He became even more aggressive when the staff told him that they might restrain him. Several passengers also got up to help the crew control him.

item.title: Trump Likely To Hold Key Meeting Over Military Action On Iran: Report

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump may discuss military options against Iran.

item.description: The meeting will come after Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran on Sunday, saying that the clock in ticking for Tehran.
item.content:encoded: The meeting will come after Donald Trump issued a stark warning to Iran on Sunday, saying that the clock in ticking for Tehran.

item.title: India, Sweden Upgrade Bilateral Ties To 'Strategic Partnership'

media:content.media:description: PM Modi had earlier visited Sweden in 2018

item.description: India and Sweden on Sunday agreed to elevate the bilateral relationship to a Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with his Swedish counterpart Ulf Kristersson, focusing on trade, technology, defence, and other key sectors
item.content:encoded: India and Sweden on Sunday agreed to elevate the bilateral relationship to a Strategic Partnership, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with his Swedish counterpart Ulf Kristersson, focusing on trade, technology, defence, and other key sectors
